title: Skill Transformer System

modules.name: shared.js
modules.note: Older/alternative shared function not used by index.js; uses buildFrontmatter/transformBody callbacks instead of FIELD_SPECS

constants.name: FIELD_SPECS
constants.field_spec_shape: { sourceKey: string, yamlKey: string, condition?: (skill) => bool, value?: (skill) => any }

interfaces.name: ProviderConfig
fields: frontmatterFields?: string[] — FIELD_SPECS keys to emit
bodyTransform?: (body: string, skill: Skill) => string — optional body post-processor
placeholderProvider?: string — override provider key for placeholder lookup (trae-cn uses 'trae')

interfaces.name: FieldSpec
fields: sourceKey: string — property on skill object
yamlKey: string — YAML frontmatter key name
value?: (skill: Skill) => any — override instead of skill[sourceKey]

interfaces.name: TransformOptions
fields: prefix?: string — prepended to every skill name
outputSuffix?: string — appended to provider output directory name
skillsVersion?: string — emitted as 'version' in frontmatter

functions.name: createTransformer
functions.signature: createTransformer(config: ProviderConfig): (skills: Skill[], distDir: string, options?: TransformOptions) => void
functions.pattern: Factory — returns a named transform closure
internal_steps: 1. Destructure config: provider, configDir, displayName, frontmatterFields, bodyTransform, placeholderProvider
3. Filter FIELD_SPECS to activeFields using frontmatterFields array
a. Build providerDir = distDir/provider+outputSuffix, skillsDir = providerDir/configDir/skills
c. Collect allSkillNames and userInvocable commandNames (with prefix)
d. For each skill: build frontmatter from activeFields + FIELD_SPECS conditions/values
h. If prefix: prefixSkillReferences(skillBody, prefix, allSkillNames, cmdPrefix)
k. Write reference .md files into skillDir/reference/
l. Write script files into skillDir/scripts/

functions.name: transformProvider
functions.signature: transformProvider(config: { provider, displayName, configDir, buildFrontmatter, transformBody? }, skills: Skill[], distDir: string, options?: { prefix, outputSuffix }) => void
functions.pattern: Direct shared function (not factory); uses buildFrontmatter callback instead of FIELD_SPECS
functions.note: Parallel/legacy design; NOT called by index.js — superseded by createTransformer factory

key_relationships: factory.js depends_on utils.js (cleanDir, ensureDir, writeFile, generateYamlFrontmatter, replacePlaceholders, prefixSkillReferences, PROVIDER_PLACEHOLDERS)
shared.js depends_on utils.js (same util set minus PROVIDER_PLACEHOLDERS)
PROVIDERS is consumed_by createTransformer at index.js instantiation time
FIELD_SPECS is consumed_by createTransformer closure (field filtering per provider config)
transform closure captures (provider, configDir, displayName, activeFields, bodyTransform, placeholderKey) from ProviderConfig
design_patterns: Factory Pattern: createTransformer(config) → transform fn — single factory produces all 9 provider transformers
Strategy Pattern: each ProviderConfig.bodyTransform is an optional strategy hook; frontmatterFields drives declarative field selection via FIELD_SPECS
Template Method: transform() defines the algorithm; bodyTransform and frontmatterFields are extension points
Placeholder Provider alias: trae-cn.placeholderProvider='trae' decouples output dir name from placeholder key
important_notes: shared.js/transformProvider is NOT used by current index.js — it is a legacy/alternative approach with buildFrontmatter callback style
FIELD_SPECS.condition controls conditional emission (e.g. argument-hint only if userInvocable is true)
cmdPrefix for prefixSkillReferences is resolved from PROVIDER_PLACEHOLDERS[placeholderKey].command_prefix, defaulting to '/'
trae-cn provider uses placeholderProvider='trae' so placeholder substitution uses trae's placeholder map even though output dir is .trae-cn
trae and trae-cn are in PROVIDERS but NOT exported as named transform functions from index.js (only 9 of 11 providers are instantiated)
skillsVersion option adds a 'version' field to frontmatter if provided
